name: qa-automation
description: Portable QA automation plugin with a qa-automation skill for creating and updating governed automation scripts from approved QA inputs.

interface.longDescription: QA Automation provides a portable skill for planner contracts, executor automation signals, manual automation requests, automation_change_set.json governance, Playwright TypeScript fallback, locator policy, validation tiers, review gates, and promotion readiness.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use qa-automation to create or update governed automation scripts from approved QA inputs.
